summary: Production API keys verification complete. All 11 tests passed. Google Places API is working with real venue data (20 venues returned from London coordinates). Stripe is using LIVE keys (checkout sessions have cs_live_ prefix). Google Play Billing is NOT configured as expected (requires service account JSON file).

endpoints: GET /api/places/nearby - Returns 20 real venues from Google Places API
GET /api/places/{place_id}/details - Returns venue details with photos, rating, address
GET /api/places/photo - Photo proxy working, returns JPEG images

details.sample_venue: Silver Cross, 33 Whitehall, London SW1A 2BX, UK

endpoints: GET /api/premium/packages - Returns 2 packages with Stripe price IDs
GET /api/tokens/packages - Returns 2 packages with Stripe price IDs

details.reason: Requires service account JSON file (GOOGLE_PLAY_CREDENTIALS_FILE env var)
details.expected_behavior: This is expected - service account not yet available

critical_code_review_comments: All production API keys are correctly configured and working
Google Places API key (AIzaSyAE7Aw3n7ikdIEwEPor8Oto77U5wwBD1aM) is valid and returning real venue data
Stripe is using LIVE keys (sk_live_51THS8GDP...) - checkout sessions have cs_live_ prefix
Google Play Billing correctly reports NOT_CONFIGURED status when service account is missing
